title: NDD CLI Conveyor Run Execution Authority Pack
summary: Upgrades CLI from broad doorway role authority to actual `ndd conveyor run` manifest orchestration authority.
hardLaw: CLI must not delegate into ../../../bin/ndd.cjs as its brain.
Conveyor run behavior lives in semantic operation graph.
Manifest stages are declared, not invented in JS.
completionPosture: After migration and resolver capability support, generated CLI can run a conveyor manifest from SEJ authority.
